payload.label: wardrobe
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped, partial view of a narrow beige wardrobe-like object covered in floral-patterned fabric with large stylized flowers; white metal support bars are visible near the top and the item appears to lean against a wall, with cloth-like texture and uneven lighting — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
